steps.title: Calculate wax consumed
steps.content:
The candle starts with 21 ounces and now has 8 ounces remaining. The amount of wax that has burned is:
$$21 - 8 = 13 \text{ ounces}$$

steps.title: Convert burn rate to time
steps.content:
The wax decreases at a rate of 1 ounce per 5 hours. To find how long 13 ounces takes to burn, multiply the amount by the time per ounce:
$$13 \text{ ounces} \times \frac{5 \text{ hours}}{1 \text{ ounce}} = 65 \text{ hours}$$
That confirms D is correct.
